event: diagnosed with right lung non-small cell lung cancer (squamous cell carcinoma)
started on tab phenytoin 300 mg at bedtime
anti-edema measures with steroids (tab dexamethasone 8 mg 3 times daily during RT)
received palliative RT to whole brain
total dose of 20 Gray in 5 fractions over one week
received one cycle of palliative chemotherapy with paclitaxel-carboplatin combination
presented with painful, erythematous lesions in the scalp
blistering involving 30% of body surface area
local skin care with antibiotic dressings
local skin care with antifungal dressings
initial percentage of epidermal detachment over 10%
concurrent use of whole brain RT and phenytoin
high dose corticosteroids instituted within 24-48 hours
work not supported by drug company
funded by Sultan Qaboos University Hospital
